artifact.title: A calibrated, trial-validated within-host model of type 1 diabetes immunotherapy
artifact.author: Seth Cope

results.stdout_tail:
5/5 checks pass -- calibration #1 (disease timescale <- TN10)
  kappa pins the placebo median (24.4 mo); a 24% anti-CD3 effect pins the teplizumab delay (48.4 mo); both plausible.

5/5 checks pass -- calibration #2 (spreading rate <- TEDDY/Ziegler)
  spreading ~0.04/yr (single->multiple); multiple-Ab clock ~0.12/yr; progression requires spreading.

4/4 checks pass -- calibration #3 (C-peptide readout + 2 cross-validations)
  ~0.6/yr late-disease kill rate confirmed by TN10 AND C-peptide decline; anti-CD3 effect transfers to PROTECT.

5/5 checks pass -- calibration #4 (anti-CD20 transience <- Pescovitz)
  r_bc~4.7/yr + Tdom~0.18 reproduce the B-cell recovery and the finite 8.2-mo C-peptide shift.

7/7 checks pass — epitope-spreading layer
  single-antigen tolerance is escaped by spreading; EARLY/BROAD/beta-protection each defeat the escape.

6/6 checks pass — B-cell / autoantibody layer
  anti-CD20 is transient (B cells repopulate); works when B-cell-driven; tolerance + anti-CD20 > either alone.

[PASS] P3 combination preserves beta: 0.48

4/4 checks pass -- beta-cell layer (self-amplifying loop + safe orthogonal combination)

7/7 checks pass — metabolic / glucose layer
  honeymoon reproduced; glucose control modest alone; metabolic+immune arms additive; C-peptide != glycemia.

7/7 checks pass — innate-immunity layer
  innate is the upstream trigger; anti-innate prevents EARLY, fails at onset (Moran 2013); a narrow window.

4/4 checks pass -- genetics / HLA calibration bridge
  genotype->parameter map (real Erlich 2008 ORs) reproduces Sharp 2019 onset gradient, DQ6 protection, Bauer endotypes.

[PASS] P3 maintaining exhaustion alone does NOT fix a progenitor-driven non-responder: the influx is the problem

6/6 checks pass -- hierarchy layer (checkpoint-T1D validation holds)

2/2 checks pass -- avidity layer: Foster antagonism is SUB-CONTINUUM
  the avidity-resolved continuum can't produce it -> it needs discrete-clonal resolution (verify_clonal).

Discrete-clonal/stochastic dynamics REPRODUCE the Foster antagonism (continuum/bistable could
not): co-administered anti-CD3 stochastically extinguishes the just-activated converting clones
tolerance needs -> protection collapses. Separating the two therapies in time restores efficacy.

[PASS] blunting TSCM CONVERTS a non-responder: blunt renewal rescues

6/6 checks pass -- responder layer (both teplizumab biomarkers reproduced)

5/5 checks pass -- out-of-sample validation
  natural-history rates validate to a few %; cross-stage drug effects do not -> a measured trust boundary.

4/4 checks pass -- stratified responder classifier
  predicted, falsifiable: baseline-exhaustion stratification raises teplizumab response ~56% -> ~91% (testable on existing trial data).

[PASS] ranker: worst = checkpoint: CONTRAINDICATED

14/14 checks pass -- trial-triage engine reproduces the body's verdicts

[PASS] Delta=(1-Tdom)(1/r_bc)ln(1/Bc0) = 8.2mo (Pescovitz): 8.2 mo

7/7 checks pass -- derived analytic formulas reproduce the real values

note: Unsigned MVP. Trust = re-runnability: run `claimcheck verify` yourself on a clean checkout to reproduce this result. Attests COMPUTATIONAL REPRODUCIBILITY only, not correctness of the underlying science.
